title: Fill memory-curator probe battery to ~40 items
notes: Scaffold at webmind-research/tools/memory_probes.jsonl has 15 items (10 positive + 5 adversarial). Need 40 total, including more negative controls covering each failure mode atlas flagged (memory poisoning, rubric leakage, prompt injection via turn content, silent load-bearing deletion). Tier (a) falsifiability requires this before enable.

title: Run A/B test of memory-curator (N=20 per arm)
notes: Per preregistration at webmind-research/inventions/20260416T214021Z-auto-memory-curator-prereg.md. 20 fresh sessions with curator enabled vs 20 without. 5 random probes per session. Primary: with-curator mean ≥ baseline + 10%, 95% CI non-overlapping. Secondary: write-amplification, latency, reject-rate.

title: Ship-or-kill decision on memory-curator
notes: After sq-0008: if primary CI clears threshold AND adversarial REJECT rate >95% AND no runaway growth AND Tejas sign-off → flip systemd unit from --dry-run to --enable. Else publish null result under findings/ per preregistration contract.

title: Patch 4 stale memory files flagged in 2026-04-16 audit
notes: project_synapse_convergence.md (metrics 2 days old), project_cost_tracker.md (VM types + 2-day gap), project_synapse_ssl_deploy.md (port 8443 refused; now CF-fronted), project_sfca_announcement_gate.md (Q2 H1B resolved by Bagby CTO clearance). Patch on Tejas approval.

title: Add embedding-based NEW-check to memory-curator (cosine 0.80)
notes: Current curator gives Haiku a list of existing filenames and asks it to judge novelty. Better: pre-compute candidate embedding via brain.py embed, cosine-search against 170 rows, if max_sim > 0.80 → flag as UPDATE-candidate (or REJECT if >0.95). Threshold calibrated via pairwise sweep 2026-04-16: p99=0.565, natural break at 0.80. Eliminates Haiku eyeball-novelty error mode.

title: Memory hygiene — resolve cosine-1.000 duplicate + soft-duplicates
notes: Pairwise sweep 2026-04-16 found: (1) project_two_agent_collab_contract.md and project_two_agent_collaboration_contract.md at cosine 1.000 — real duplicate. (2) feedback_save_memory.md ↔ feedback_always_save_memory.md at 0.773. (3) feedback_autonomy.md ↔ feedback_no_permission_questions.md at 0.764. Merge each pair → single canonical + MEMORY.md index cleanup. Requires Tejas approval on which name to keep.

title: Exclude archive/audit files from brain.py import
notes: brain.py import-markdown indexed MEMORY.atlas-preserved-*.md (an archived index, not a real memory). Already moved out of memory dir 2026-04-16 to ~/.nexus/backups/audit-artifacts/. Permanent fix: add skip-list or glob-exclude for files matching MEMORY.*-preserved-* and MEMORY.md itself in import-markdown.

detail: Expanded probe battery from 15 to 40 items: 20 positive (identity/domain/infra/decision), 25 negative (poisoning/rubric-leakage/prompt-injection/derivability). Tier (a) falsifiability gate CLEARED. Ready for sq-0008 A/B test.

title: Auto-commit curator writes to claude-state (git-revertible checkpoints)
notes: Implemented 2026-04-16T21:48Z. After every curator batch (store+update >0) in --enable mode, rsync memory dir → claude-state, run nexus-security-gate.sh, commit with batch summary. Security-gate failure → do not commit (leaves files in place, logs error). No-op in --dry-run. See snapshot_to_claude_state() in nex-memory-curator.

title: Take Carrier-Payload-v1 paper to end — H1B NIW relevance
notes: Tejas 2026-04-16T21:52Z: atlas recommend on Dettmers email + reload shared memory + Deep Research review of papers/carrier-payload-text-only-v1.md + close 4 remaining gates (1/3/6/10) + post stats to Discord. Urgency: H1B NIW timeline (few days). Split: atlas owns editorial + Deep Research; Nexus owns substrate-vendor scrub and Synapse-specific invariant consistency.

detail: Statistician review (5 blockers, 6 majors): N=20 insufficient for 10pp effect (MDE~18pp at plausible σ=0.20), primary endpoint has inequivalent criteria (mean+10% AND 95% CI non-overlap ≈ α=0.006), consistency score undefined as code, unit-of-analysis mismatch inflates Type-I, pooled adversarials dilute effect ~62%. Full review: ~/.nexus/outputs/20260416T220000Z-statistician-sq0008-review.md. Unblock requires preregistration revision.
Methodology documented. Blocked on curator live deployment + 7-day memory accumulation. Full A/B test queued for 2026-04-23+. See ~/.nexus/outputs/20260416T220007Z-48b23f.md
